channel.title: dataviz on Tyler Burleigh
channel.description: Recent content in dataviz on Tyler Burleigh

item.title: Exploring Philly's world of murals (pt1)
item.description: When I visited Philadelphia recently I was left with a lasting impression of the street art. It was really incredible, not just because it was beautiful art and culture to stand before and appreciate, but also because of what it meant about the city organizing around and celebrating this public good and trying to create more of it. I was curious about the history.
